title: RepairTool
description: A simple yet powerful mod that allows players to repair tools by pressing a configurable key (default: R). Each press restores 25% of the tool's maximum durability, consuming the appropriate resources (e.g., iron ingots for iron tools).
body:
[![Lightarue Hosting Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1210744/description_45293afd-81c5-4e69-aff0-25c907050440.png)](https://dathost.net/r/osama/minecraft-server-hosting)



🔧 RepairTools – Repair Your Tools with a Simple Key Hold!

RepairTools is a lightweight and intuitive Minecraft mod that makes tool repair effortless. Instead of using an anvil or crafting table, simply hold down a configurable key (default: R) to gradually restore your tool’s durability. The repair process automatically stops when the tool is fully repaired, ensuring efficient resource management.

⚙ Key Features:

✅ Customizable Key Binding – Easily change the repair key in the Key Bindings menu.
✅ Progressive Repair – Holding the key gradually restores durability instead of repairing in chunks.
✅ Resource Consumption – Uses the correct material from your inventory (e.g., Iron Ingots, Diamonds, Gold Ingots, Netherite Scraps).
✅ Smart Auto-Stop – The repair process halts automatically when the tool is at max durability.
✅ User-Friendly Design – Simple, intuitive, and works seamlessly in survival gameplay.

🔨 How It Works:
Hold a damaged tool in your main hand.
Press and hold the configured repair key (default: R).
The tool’s durability will gradually increase, consuming the required repair materials.
Release the key anytime to stop repairing, or let it auto-stop when fully repaired.
